\documentclass{article}

\input{config/tex/get_random_exercises}
\input{config/tex/copy_protect}
\input{config/tex/copyright}
\input{config/tex/plagiarism}
\newcommand{\testDuration}{120}


\newcommand{\useLanguage}{ENG}  % Set language: PL or ENG
\newcommand{\pdfTitle}{ Tytul}
\newcommand{\CopyrightAuthors}{a \& b}
\author{
    a \\ e-mail  \href{mailto:f@a.net}{f@a.net} \and
    b \\ e-mail  \href{mailto:f@b.net}{f@b.net}
}
\input{config/tex/preambule}
\usePreambule

% Include function name mapping (generated by main.js)
\IfFileExists{build/function_mapping_\myseed.tex}{
    \input{build/function_mapping_\myseed.tex}
    \PackageWarning{FunctionMapping}{Loaded obfuscated function names for seed \myseed}
}{
    \PackageWarning{FunctionMapping}{No function mapping found for seed \myseed - using original names}
}
\makeatletter
\def\func#1{%
    \@ifundefined{func#1}{%
        \texttt{DUPA #1}% Fallback: show original name
    }{%
        \csname func#1\endcsname% Use obfuscated name if defined
    }%
}
\makeatother


\begin{document}
	\date{\monthyearcmd}
	\maketitle

\ifthenelse{\equal{\useLanguage}{PL}}{%
	\input{config/tex/pre_instruction_pl}
}{%
	\input{config/tex/pre_instruction_eng}
}


\usePlagiarism


\inputexercises{\myseed}{\mycount}
\useCopyright

\noindent\textbf{Seed: \myseed}

\end{document}
